To address these challenges, a novel Rotationally Equivariant Quantum Graph Neural Network (REQGNN) with trainable compression encoder and entanglement-enhanced aggregation mechanism is proposed.

name: Theory for Equivariant Quantum Neural Networks
snippet:
2024 · Cited by 178 — A comprehensive theoretical framework to design equivariant quantum neural networks (EQNNs) for essentially any relevant symmetry group.
In this work, we import these ideas to the quantum realm by presenting a general theoretical framework to understand, classify, design, and implement equivariant quantum neural networks.
